ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., ADBL, AHPC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock on that day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /*  Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at which the trade was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trade record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at which the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, executed, canceled) */,
  "fill_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was filled */,
  "fill_date" TEXT /* Date the order was filled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, news alert) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., unread, read, dismissed) */,
  "is_emailed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert was sent via email */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
